title: George Eliot Hospital NHS Trust: cervical screening programme
body: "Quality assurance (QA) visits are carried out by the Public Health England screening quality assurance service (SQAS).  The evidence for this report comes from:   routine monitoring data collected by the NHS screening programmes data and reports from external organisations evidence submitted by the provider(s), commissioner and external organisations information shared with the Midlands and East regional SQAS as part of the visit process   "
